goal: Build an Isaac Sim analog of the Open X-Embodiment task 'pick up the sponge and place it in the bowl' (OXE episode class, RT-1 dataset task index 0042; arxiv.org/abs/2310.08864). A Franka Panda picks a yellow sponge (0.09 x 0.06 x 0.04 m rectangular prim with rubber physics material, semantic label 'sponge') from a table surface and places it inside a bowl (create_bin with rounded-corner geometry approximation). The canonical is a cross-benchmark parity check: it maps a real-robot demonstration dataset task directly to Isaac Sim, enabling sim2real gap measurement. cuRobo motion planning; CPU dynamics for determinism.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-rtx-sponge-bowl:

1) RT-X task fidelity: The OXE task is 'pick up the sponge and place it in the bowl'. We represent the sponge as a Cube prim with size [0.09, 0.06, 0.04] m (typical kitchen sponge dimensions), yellow OmniPBR material, rubber physics material (high friction, low restitution). The bowl is a create_bin(size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.08]) placed within Franka reach — large enough to accept the sponge easily.

2) Geometry and reach: Franka mounted on table (z=0.75). Sponge rests at [0.25, 0.30, 0.775] (on table top). Bowl placed at [0.25, -0.30, 0.75] (behind sponge, within reach). Max horizontal reach: sqrt(0.25^2 + 0.30^2) = 0.39m — well inside Franka's 0.85m reach envelope. Sponge centre z = table_top(0.75) + half_sponge_height(0.02) = 0.770.

3) Physics: Sponge is a rigid body (deformable mesh is physx_instability risk). Rubber physics material gives realistic high-friction contact. CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, MBP broadphase) ensures determinism for CI. sleepThreshold=0.0 keeps sponge simulated through verify phase.

4) Cross-benchmark annotation: RT-X source noted in task_id and goal. This enables future measure_sim_real_gap calls against real OXE demonstration data once a rosbag replayer is available.

5) cuRobo approach height: sponge is flat (0.04m tall). Default approach_height=0.15 gives 0.11m clearance above sponge top — sufficient. No belt so belt_path omitted.

6) Sponge color: yellow (RGB [0.95, 0.85, 0.10]) to match typical kitchen sponge appearance and aid visual verification.

7) Bowl proximity sensor at bowl centre top ([0.25, -0.30, 0.798]) with size [0.18, 0.18, 0.04] — detects sponge landing inside bowl for verify_args confirmation.

8) semantic label 'sponge' on the sponge prim enables future SDG annotations and vision_detect_objects queries.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Work table (1.2 × 0.8 × 0.75 m) ─────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Franka Panda ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Base at table top z=0.75; default orientation faces +Y.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Sponge material: yellow OmniPBR, high roughness ──────────────────────────
create_material(
    material_path="/World/Looks/SpongeYellow",
    shader_type="OmniPBR",
    diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.85, 0.10],
    roughness=0.85,
    metallic=0.0,
)

# ── Sponge: 90 × 60 × 40 mm rectangular prim on table ───────────────────────
# Table top z=0.75; sponge half-height=0.02; centre z=0.770.
# Use Cube + non-uniform scale: scale=[0.045, 0.030, 0.020] → full 90×60×40 mm
# (Cube default edge=2m; scale*2 gives metres).
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Sponge",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.25, 0.30, 0.770],
    scale=[0.045, 0.030, 0.020],
)
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Sponge", material_path="/World/Looks/SpongeYellow")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Sponge", class_name="sponge")
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Sponge", schema_name=api)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Sponge", material_name="rubber")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Sponge", attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Sponge", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.05)

# ── Bowl: create_bin approximation (200 × 200 × 80 mm) ───────────────────────
# Placed at [0.25, -0.30, 0.75] — same X as sponge, on opposite side of robot.
# Bowl top z ≈ 0.75 + 0.08 = 0.83; sponge drop_z = bowl_top + sponge_half(0.02) = 0.85.
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/Bowl",
    size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.08],
    position=[0.25, -0.30, 0.75],
)

# ── Proximity sensor inside bowl to confirm sponge delivery ──────────────────
# Sensor volume: 0.18 × 0.18 × 0.04 m centred at bowl interior [0.25, -0.30, 0.798].
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/BowlSensor",
    position=[0.25, -0.30, 0.798],
    size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.04],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Sponge",
)

# ── cuRobo pick-place: sponge → bowl ─────────────────────────────────────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/Sponge"],
    destination_path="/World/Bowl",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bowl"],
    approach_height=0.15,
)
failure_modes: Sponge scale vs gripper: Franka parallel-jaw default open width ~0.08 m; sponge Y-dimension is 0.06 m → 20 mm margin per finger. If cuRobo fails to plan a grasp, try scale=[0.030, 0.025, 0.020] (60×50×40 mm) to widen finger clearance.
Flat sponge height: Sponge top z=0.790; Franka EE approach from above needs careful z-clearance. If approach clips Table, increase sponge z to 0.800 (place sponge on small standoff block).
apply_physics_material rubber not found: use set_attribute on physxMaterial damping/friction properties instead — set staticFriction=0.8, dynamicFriction=0.6, restitution=0.0.

create_bin walls visible inside bowl: bowl interior is (0.20 - 2×0.01) = 0.18 m; sponge 0.09 m fits with 0.045 m clearance each side. If bin wall collision prevents sponge drop, increase bin size to [0.22, 0.22, 0.10].

Bowl tip: if sponge lands off-centre and pushes bowl wall, add apply_api_schema(prim_path='/World/Bowl', schema_name='PhysicsCollisionAPI') + anchor bowl with set_attribute xformOp:translate lock=True.

workpiece.note: Represents sponge; rigid Cube with rubber material and sponge semantic label

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_material(
    material_path="/World/Looks/SpongeYellow",
    shader_type="OmniPBR",
    diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.85, 0.10],
    roughness=0.85,
    metallic=0.0,
)

create_prim(
    prim_path={{workpiece.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{workpiece.position}},
    scale={{workpiece.scale}},
)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, material_path="/World/Looks/SpongeYellow")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, class_name={{workpiece.semantic_label}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, schema_name=api)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, material_name={{workpiece.material}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, attr_name="physics:mass", value={{workpiece.mass_kg}})

create_bin(
    prim_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    size={{destination_bin.size}},
    position={{destination_bin.position}},
)

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/BowlSensor",
    position=[{{destination_bin.position[0]}}, {{destination_bin.position[1]}}, 0.798],
    size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.04],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Sponge",
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=[{{workpiece.path}}],
    destination_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{destination_bin.path}}],
    approach_height=0.15,
)
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate ⏳; function-gate ⏳ (requires Franka USD + cuRobo + PhysX live Kit)
